backlog.name: Omidyar Network
backlog.why: Large multi-issue philanthropy with AI governance interests; potential AI safety grantee

backlog.name: Patrick J. McGovern Foundation
backlog.why: Funds AI and tech research; historically supported foundational work

backlog.name: Simons Foundation
backlog.why: Major STEM funder; flirtation with AI safety via individual researchers

backlog.name: Ford Foundation
backlog.why: AI accountability, algorithmic justice, and governance research

backlog.name: Humanity AI coalition
backlog.why: Ford+MacArthur+Omidyar+Mellon 10-funder coalition, $500M/5yr for AI governance/labor/civic; $10M open call expected summer 2026 (humanityai.ai) — add when the call opens

backlog.name: UK DSIT AI Assurance Innovation Fund
backlog.why: £11M assurance/audit tooling fund, spring 2026 launch committed; add when the portal is verifiably live on gov.uk

backlog.name: Emergent Ventures
backlog.why: Mercatus fast grants $10-100K rolling; has funded AI-safety people (Epoch) though no dedicated safety track

backlog.name: Navigation Fund
backlog.why: Jed McCaleb ~$1.3B endowment; AI portfolio narrowed toward digital sentience — verify fit before adding

backlog.name: Constellation
backlog.why: Berkeley AI-safety research center: Astra Fellowship ($8,400/mo + compute) + incubator; fellowship-shaped rather than grants — decide modeling before adding
